name: Mandapa, a Ritz-Carlton Reserve
description: An ultra-luxurious sanctuary nestled along the Ayung River in Ubud, offering personalized butler service and exquisite villas.

name: Four Seasons Resort Bali at Sayan
description: An architectural icon surrounded by lush rice terraces and jungle, featuring world-class wellness facilities and serene river views.

name: The St. Regis Bali Resort
description: A refined beachfront property in Nusa Dua known for its signature butler service, sprawling saltwater lagoon, and elegant tropical design.

name: COMO Shambhala Estate
description: A residential health retreat focusing on holistic wellness, offering customized experiences in a peaceful forest setting near Ubud.

name: Alila Villas Uluwatu
description: A stunning eco-friendly resort perched on limestone cliffs with dramatic ocean views, minimalist design, and private pool villas.
